user.title: Set up Venstar ACC-TSENWIFI Listener
user.description: This integration listens for the UDP broadcasts sent by Venstar wireless temperature sensors (and the companion emulator) on port 5001 and creates a device for each sensor it hears. Home Assistant must be on the same network/broadcast domain as the sensors; dockerized installs need host networking.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance is allowed.

init.title: Listener Options
init.description: Changing these reloads the integration and rebinds the socket.

data.ignore_local_emulated: Ignore sensors emulated by the co-installed emulator on this Home Assistant

data_description.port: The port the sensors broadcast to (default 5001). Only change this if you have relocated the traffic.
data_description.ignore_local_emulated: When on, sensors broadcast by the venstar_acc_tsenwifi_emulator integration on this same instance are dropped, and deleting their devices sticks. Leave off to see them (useful when testing side by side).
